rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 2, 2018 line 3. rulings.Case Title: PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SHUI KING KWON HOM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Joinder In Pure Entertainment, Llcs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order Preventing Re-Examination Of Vlad Cood At Deposition, Or To Limit Deposition
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 2, 2018 line 3. CROSS DEFENDANT VLAD COOD's Joinder In Pure Entertainment, LLC's Motion For Protective Order Preventing Re-Examination Of Vlad Cood At Deposition, Or To Limit Deposition GRANTED in part. The Court will order the deposition of PMK to proceed. The scope of the deposition will be limited. The production of documents will be limited to the documents not previously produced in this action. Parties to appear at 8:15 a.m. and engage in meaningful meet and confer efforts regarding the scope of the deposition. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: YEE LUNG HONG VS. ISAAC HERNANDEZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Strike Of Defendant Isaac Hernandez To First Amended Complaint Of Plaintiff Yee Lung Hong; Mp&As
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 2, 2018 line 5. DEFENDANT ISAAC HERNANDEZ's Motion To Strike To First Amended Complaint Of Plaintiff Yee Lung Hong GRANTED. No opposition filed. Paragraph 12 of the First Amended Complaint is stricken. Defendant shall file answer within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Defendant to prepare order in conformity with the tentative ruling and present it at the hearing. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ESTEBAN LAU VS. MARIA PEREGRINA SANCHEZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: To Compel Responses To Discovery To Establish Admission From Defendant And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 2, 2018 line 6. PLAINTIFF ESTEBAN LAU's Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery To Establish Admission From Defendant And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant GRANTED, subject to opposition. Admissions are deemed admitted. Defendant shall provide complete verified responses without objections to Form Interrogatories and Request for Production by 9:00 a.m. on February 5, 2017. Sanctions granted in the amount of $960. Plaintiff to serve order on Defendant by hand-delivery no later than 2:00 p.m. on February 2, 2018. = (501/REQ)
Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 2, 2018 line 7. DEFENDANT RENE MOORE's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR, First Amended Complaint on file. = (501/REQ)
